raw_consumer_statement: I sent a letter via XXXX XXXX on or about XX/XX/ to the following mailing address : Card Services XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX  XXXX This was a request to open a dispute for a transaction with XXXX  made onXX/XX/2023 in the amount of {$140.00} I submitted this dispute within 30 days of the transaction. I request that the full amount be credited back to my account and that all the interest charges accumulated over the time be credited as well.
